title: QuantaAlpha-inspired features: evolutionary optimization, gap factors, transfer testing
description: Epic tracking implementation of features proposed in docs/quantaalpha-feature-proposal.md. Adapted from QuantaAlpha paper (arXiv:2602.07085) for deterministic pipeline—no LLM override of holdings/metrics. Priority: P0 gap features, P1 transfer testing, P2 evolutionary optimizer, P3 diversified templates, complexity control, lineage.
notes:
Source: docs/quantaalpha-feature-proposal.md
P0 (1.4) and P1 (1.5) complete. Documentation updated: quick-start, backtesting, user-guide, test docs, test-suite-documentation.

title: Evolutionary strategy optimizer
description: Mutation/crossover on config params, fitness=Sharpe. Store trajectory history. See docs/quantaalpha-feature-proposal.md §1

title: Diversified strategy templates
description: YAML templates (value/momentum/quality-tilt). Parallel run, correlation matrix. See docs/quantaalpha-feature-proposal.md §2

title: Factor complexity & redundancy control
description: Penalize complex configs, cross-score redundancy. See docs/quantaalpha-feature-proposal.md §3

title: Overnight & gap-based features
description: gap_features.py: overnight_gap_pct, gap_acceptance_score. P0 priority. See docs/quantaalpha-feature-proposal.md §4
notes: Done: gap_features.py + tests. Wired into engineering.py

title: Transfer & robustness testing
description: --transfer-universe CLI, side-by-side metrics. P1 priority. See docs/quantaalpha-feature-proposal.md §5

title: Trajectory lineage & audit trail
description: Run ID, parent config hash, mutation tag in outputs. See docs/quantaalpha-feature-proposal.md §6
